turns.content:
Execute Phase 1 of the project cleanup: Root Debris & Broken Symlinks Removal.

## Context
This is the Hivemind plugin project at `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/`. We're cleaning up root-level debris before restructuring.

## Tasks to execute

### Task 1: Move session debris to .archive/
Move all `session-*.md` files from project root to `.archive/stale-session-files/`.
- List them first: `ls /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/session-*.md`
- Ensure `.archive/stale-session-files/` exists (create if needed)
- Use `git mv` to move them (preserves history)
- Verify count: 32 files

### Task 2: Remove broken symlinks in agents/
The directory `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/agents/` contains 6 symlinks to `/tmp/arxitect/` which is ephemeral and broken.
- Remove the entire `agents/` directory: `git rm -r agents/`
- These are NOT project agents — they're external tooling symlinks

### Task 3: Remove broken symlinks in skills/
The directory `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/skills/` contains 7 symlinks to `/tmp/arxitect/` and `/tmp/conductor/`.
- Remove the entire `skills/` directory: `git rm -r skills/`
- These are NOT project skills — they're external tooling symlinks

### Task 4: Remove duplicate .opencode/command/ directory
The directory `.opencode/command/` (singular) contains 66 gsd-* files that are byte-identical duplicates of `.opencode/commands/` (plural).
- Remove: `git rm -r .opencode/command/`
- Keep `.opencode/commands/` untouched

### Task 5: Remove dev artifact dot-directories
Remove these dev artifact directories from git tracking:
- `.agent/` — GSD file manifest
- `.bob/` — unknown tool skills
- `.qoder/` — unknown tool skills
- `.qwen/` — IDE artifact (full agent/skill/command copies)
- `.roo/` — unknown tool skills
- `.scratch/` — ephemeral scratch docs
- `.tmp/` — temp directory

For each: `git rm -rf <dir>` if git-tracked, else `rm -rf <dir>`

### Task 6: Update .gitignore
Add these patterns to `.gitignore` (append to existing):
```
# Session debris
session-*.md

# Dev artifacts
.agent/
.bob/
.qoder/
.qwen/
.roo/
.scratch/
.tmp/

# Stale checkpoints
.checkpoints/
```

### Task 7: Commit
After all changes, commit with message:
`cleanup(phase-1): remove root debris, broken symlinks, duplicate commands — 32 session files, 13 symlinks, 66 duplicates, 7 dev dot-dirs`

## Important notes
- Use `git rm` for tracked files to properly stage deletion
- Use `rm -rf` only for untracked files
- Check `git status` before and after
- Make atomic changes — all in one commit
- Run `git add .gitignore` explicitly
- If any path doesn't exist or isn't tracked, skip it gracefully

Return: summary of what was deleted/moved and final git status.
